source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder of total 1 kg steel contains 0.5 kg ammonia at 1600 kPa, both masses at 120\circ\text{C}. Some stops are placed that so a minimum volume is 0.02 m^3. Now the whole system is cooled down to 30\circ\text{C} by heat transfer to the ambient, and during the process the steel keeps the same temperature as the ammonia. Find the entropy generation for the process.

Find the entropy generation for the process.
